summary: Implemented V0.8-M5 requirements. Created an example custom DAG workflow (templates/workflows/custom-deploy-pipeline.yaml) showcasing custom authoring with mixed bash and ai_execution nodes. Formally documented the Team Mode Git Dual-Tiered Synchronization protocol (The 'Agent Sync' Protocol) in documentation/EN/TEAM_COLLABORATION.md and documentation/ZH/TEAM_COLLABORATION.md, establishing the decentralized pull-model for remote teams.
